ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stream_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stream metric entry */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the stream being monitored */,
  "bitrate" INTEGER /* Current bitrate of the stream (in bps) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the stream (e.g., 1080p, 720p) */,
  "frame_rate" INTEGER /* Frame rate of the stream */,
  "buffering_time" INTEGER /* Time spent buffering (in seconds) */,
  "latency" INTEGER /* Latency of the stream (in milliseconds) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region where the stream is being monitored */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for streaming */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user associated with the stream */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stream_metrics_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES error_events ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stream_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_events" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error event */,
  "event_source" TEXT /* Source of the error (e.g., player-internal, application-level) */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error occurred */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the stream associated with the error */,
  "error_description" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  "error_code" INTEGER /* Standardized code for the error type */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the error (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  "affected_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the error (in seconds) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user associated with the error */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region where the error occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device where the error occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_events_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES stream_metrics ("stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisement_events" (
  "ad_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertisement event */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the advertisement shown */,
  "ad_sid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the advertisement session */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the advertisement event occurred */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the stream associated with the advertisement */,
  "ad_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the advertisement (in seconds) */,
  "ad_position" TEXT /* Position of the advertisement (e.g., pre-roll, mid-roll, post-roll) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user associated with the advertisement */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region where the advertisement was shown */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device where the advertisement was shown */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisement_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisement_events_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES stream_metrics ("stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating the last time the user logged in */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating the last activity performed by the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
